title: Decision
description: An AI decision with the full reasoning trace required for judge-visible "AI Demonstration".

after.description: State after the decision, if applicable.

before.description: State before the decision (for before/after comparison), if applicable.

inputs_considered.description: Structured snapshot of the inputs the agent considered.

latency_ms.description: How long the decision took (ms) — observability for the AI path.

reasoning.description: The model's reasoning for this decision.

DecisionType.description: Which operational decision the agent made.

oneOf.description: How much to tip for a bundle.
Whether to submit now or hold.
Whether/how to retry a failed submission.
